ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that made the prediction */,
  "prediction_values" TEXT /* The predicted values as an array */,
  "prediction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_context" TEXT /* Context or metadata associated with the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neural_network_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "neurons" TEXT /* Configuration of neurons in the model */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the model */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs the model was trained */,
  "random_seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for training the model */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate of the model */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate of the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN, LSTM) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in seconds */,
  "training_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training */,
  "training_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model was trained (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  "model_repository_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository where the model is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neural_network_models_model_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_repository_id") REFERENCES model_repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model architecture */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "architecture_details" TEXT /* Details of the model's architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_architectures_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "random_seed" INTEGER /* Random seed */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used during training (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate used during training */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used during training (e.g., MSE, Cross-Entropy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Current active status of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., train, evaluate) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_context" TEXT /* Context or metadata associated with the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model share event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "shared_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the model */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the model is shared */,
  "share_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was shared */,
  "share_context" TEXT /* Context or metadata associated with the share event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_shares_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_shares_shared_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "action_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_device" TEXT /* Device used for the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "action_context" TEXT /* Context or metadata associated with the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of the repository (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "repository_description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "repository_security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the repository (e.g., public, private) */,
  "repository_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_repositories_repository_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployment_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "deployment_context" TEXT /* Context or metadata associated with the deployment */,
  "deployment_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_network_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_deployment_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
